---
title: "Papers"
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: table
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, date, description, categories, versions]
  categories: true
  date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
  filter-ui: [title, categories]
  sort-ui: [date, title]
---

Journal articles and preprints.

<!-- Each paper lives in its own subdirectory with an index.qmd acting as its
     overview page. The overview's categories should reflect current status:
     draft | submitted | under-review | revision | accepted | published.
     Version files within a paper directory can be named anything (e.g.,
     v1-draft.qmd, v2-submitted.qmd) and are listed inside the overview page. -->
